name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data aggregation causes late reports. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Manual aggregation of sales data leads to time-consuming report generation.
